description: Grants the core event listen/unlisten ACL to the launcher windows (main, main-*). The launcher SPA is REMOTELY served from the embedded chan-server loopback (WebviewUrl::External http://127.0.0.1:<port>/), so default.json's permissions — which carry no `remote` scope — do not reach it; a Tauri capability applies to remotely-loaded content only when it declares `remote.urls`. Without this the launcher's `onTauriEvent('devserver-control-closed', …)` (web-launcher App.svelte) is denied at runtime with `plugin:event|listen not allowed by ACL`, so the connect-script-exit re-run/abandon survey never fires (C2, seam 3). Scoped to core:event only — the launcher is otherwise pure HTTP (it drives the desktop through chan-server, never a Tauri invoke), so it needs no other remote IPC; the powerful local-only grants in default.json (updater, process, dialog) deliberately stay off remote content, mirroring the tight remote scope on workspace.json.
